spots.name: Rynne Beach / Pawtucket Blvd / Lowell Riverwalk North
spots.note: Where the riverwalk meets the beach

spots.name: Lowell Riverwalk South View
spots.note: South-facing view along the Merrimack

spots.name: Rogers Fort Hill Park
spots.note: Hilltop park with river panorama

spots.name: Wamesit Falls Overlook
spots.note: Dramatic falls on the Concord River

spots.name: Middlesex Canal
spots.note: Historic 1803 canal towpath

spots.name: Winning Pond
spots.note: Quiet pond with reflections

spots.name: The Millstream Falls
spots.note: Hidden gem at 105 Mill Rd. Park across the street, knock on the white door — if no answer, walk the property.

spots.name: Heart Pond Beach
spots.note: Secluded heart-shaped pond

spots.name: Trap Falls
spots.note: Dramatic cascading waterfall in Ashby

spots.name: Barrett Park
spots.note: Peaceful park with long views

spots.name: Sholan Farms View
spots.note: Hilltop orchard with sweeping vista

spots.name: Wachusett Mountain 360° Vista
spots.note: Full panoramic summit views — highest point nearby

spots.name: Old Stone Church View
spots.note: Ruins on the Wachusett Reservoir shore

spots.name: Wachusett Dam
spots.note: Massive dam with reservoir views

spots.name: Prospect Hill Rd (Harvard)
spots.note: Elevated road with western views

spots.name: Walden Pond
spots.note: National Historic Landmark — where Thoreau lived 1845–47. Crystal clear glacial water, no streams in or out.

spots.name: Prospect Hill (view of Boston)
spots.note: Distant Boston skyline vista

spots.name: Forest River Park Beach
spots.note: Sandy beach with harbor views

spots.name: Winter Island Beach
spots.note: Rocky shore with Fort Pickering Lighthouse (1871). Walk the breakwater for close views.

spots.name: Singing Beach
spots.note: Sand that squeaks when you walk — unique

spots.name: Blue Hills Observatory
spots.note: Weather observatory with Boston skyline views

spots.name: Dresser Hill View
spots.note: Elevated hilltop with far-reaching views — spectacular sunsets over rolling hills

spots.name: Cascading Waters
spots.note: 60-foot roadside waterfall in Worcester — powerful in spring. Park at 135 Olean St.

spots.name: Shining Rock Trail
spots.note: Former granite quarries with sweeping Blackstone River Valley views from rocky ledges.

spots.name: Tucker Brook Falls
spots.note: Wide 12-foot cascade fanning over rocky ledges — Tucker Brook Town Forest, Milford NH.

spots.name: Lower Purgatory Falls
spots.note: 12-foot waterfall splitting over a massive glacial boulder — gushes in spring.
